testcase.name: test_login_with_invalid_password

failure.message: AssertionError: expected status code 401 but got 500

testcase.failure: Traceback (most recent call last): File "test_auth.py", line 47, in test_login_with_invalid_password self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 401) AssertionError: 500 != 401 The server raised an unhandled NullReferenceException when the password field was empty after trimming whitespace.

testcase.name: test_charge_declined_card

failure.message: Timeout waiting for payment gateway response

testcase.failure: Traceback (most recent call last): File "test_payment.py", line 88, in test_charge_declined_card response = gateway.charge(card=declined_test_card, amount=2500) TimeoutError: Gateway did not respond within 5000ms. Suspected network flakiness or sandbox outage.

testcase.name: test_stock_level_sync

error.message: ConnectionRefusedError: could not connect to inventory-service:8080

testcase.error: Traceback (most recent call last): File "test_inventory.py", line 23, in test_stock_level_sync client.connect("inventory-service", 8080) ConnectionRefusedError: [Errno 111] Connection refused
